title: How one undisclosed campaign vehicle led to an election being set aside in Tamil Nadu
description: In 1991, while AIADMK candidate R. Puthunainar Athithan was celebrating his victory in the Chernamahadevi constituency, his rival P.H. Pandian filed an election petition in the Madras High Court, accusing Athithan of having indulged in corrupt practices under the Representation of the People Act
